title: Not Enough Structures
description: More structures to give your Minecraft world a new look!
body:
![Project logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6b370569a862a7ca71dab19a25dfaa0cc12b181.png)

**Now with 1.21 support!**
### What is Not Enough Structures
**Not Enough Structures** is an Data Pack which adds new vanilla-like small to medium sized structures to the game. It includes structures from small huts to tall observation towers!
